# Ray Lin (Hsu-Jui Lin · LIN0304)

> Agentic Systems Engineer in Taipei, Taiwan (UTC+8). I build the infrastructure that
> lets frontier AI models execute complex tasks reliably: agent skills, agent harnesses,
> loop engineering, model orchestration, and benchmark-driven evaluation. Creator of
> UniBench, a benchmark-aware model intelligence and routing layer.

Ray Lin works on agentic systems engineering: decomposing complex tasks into verifiable
steps; separating planner, executor, critic, and verifier roles; routing tasks across
models based on empirical benchmark performance; tool use, memory/state design,
observability, failure recovery, and human-in-the-loop control boundaries. Interested in
moving AI from chat interfaces toward executable, auditable, self-improving work systems.
Stack: Python, TypeScript, Node.js, Solidity; OpenAI (GPT, Codex), Anthropic (Claude,
Claude Code), Model Context Protocol (MCP), multi-agent systems.

## Profile

- [GitHub](https://github.com/LIN0304): code, projects, and this profile repository
- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/hsu-jui-lin-50b82b216/): professional profile (Hsu-Jui Lin)
- [X / Twitter](https://x.com/RayLin_AI): @RayLin_AI — agents, evals, orchestration

## Projects

- [UniBench](https://github.com/LIN0304): benchmark-aware model intelligence layer —
  connects LLM benchmark data, task ontologies, and model capability profiles to route
  each task to the model best suited for it: route(task) = argmax(capability − λ·cost − μ·latency)

## This repository

- [README](https://github.com/LIN0304/LIN0304/blob/main/README.md): animated profile page —
  every animation is hand-authored pure-SMIL SVG (no JavaScript, no CSS), including a
  reactor-core atom, 3D wireframe geometry, a particle collider, and a mission-control panel
- [Agent interface](https://github.com/LIN0304#_-10--agent-interface): structured
  machine-readable profile block for AI agents (YAML), plus a schema.org Person JSON-LD
  object in the README's leading HTML comment

## Collaboration

- Open to: agent infrastructure, evals, model orchestration. Reach out on LinkedIn or X.
